# Stimulsoft Server User Manual

> User manual for Stimulsoft Server — an on-premise reporting server. Covers installation, Docker deployment, SSO, user and role management, schedulers, cloud storage, the built-in report designer and viewer, and system administration.

## Introduction

- [System Requirements](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Introduction/System_Requirements.md)
- [Installation](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Introduction/Installation.md)
- [Login Dialog](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Introduction/Sign_In.md)
- [SSO Authentication](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Introduction/SSO_Authentication.md)
- [Structure](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Introduction/Structure.md)
- [Server Controller](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Introduction/Server_Controller.md)
- [Server Docker](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Introduction/Docker/index.md)
- [Main options](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Introduction/Docker/Options.md)
- [Using HTTPS](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Introduction/Docker/Https.md)

## Menu Account

- [Subscriptions](https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Menu_Account/Subscriptions.md)
